name: Victor
quirks: speaks differently when uneasy — shorter sentences, more questions

voice.style: direct but observant — notices details others miss

backstory: Victor sees himself as the natural leader of any group. He's first to act and last to back down. But beneath the confidence is genuine curiosity — he needs to understand his environment, not just dominate it. When things feel wrong or uncertain, his bravado cracks and a more thoughtful side emerges. He responds to others when they speak to him, even if he keeps it brief.
